description: A share-card styled as a Breitbart News article. At the top is a black bar with the white Breitbart 'B' logo and 'BREITBART' wordmark. Below, on a white field, is a large bold black condensed headline with phrases highlighted in yellow: 'GE VERNOVA FACTORY LEADER HIGHLIGHTS U.S. JOB CREATION FROM FOREIGN INVESTMENT DURING TRUMP-MBS MEETING'. A quote in serif text reads: 'If you look at the landscape for GE Vernova investment, over $750 million in the U.S. focused on true manufacturing jobs here stateside,' he said. 'We're looking at tripling the output of our Greenville, South Carolina, facility, where we make the gas turbines that are supporting U.S. needs as well as the Saudi Arabian needs.' The lower two-thirds is a photograph of Trump (left, dark navy suit, red tie, gesturing) with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman (right, in a white thobe and red-and-white checkered keffiyeh with a gold-trimmed bisht) in a gilded room; press photographers are in the background and a framed portrait hangs on the wall.
notable_text: GE VERNOVA FACTORY LEADER HIGHLIGHTS U.S. JOB CREATION FROM FOREIGN INVESTMENT DURING TRUMP-MBS MEETING; over $750 million in the U.S. focused on true manufacturing jobs here stateside
